name: Quote Builder
goal: Operate and improve the live Foreman contractor quote builder as a durable owner product.
knownFacts: The live product is available at https://foreman-quote-studio.netlify.app/.
The local product workspace is a structured Next.js application backed by Supabase.
The Netlify site is linked and live.
The product does not yet have an isolated Git repository and dedicated remote.
scope: Create, edit, price, and export contractor quotes through the live product.
Track product work, evidence, quality, cost, and lessons in this AG OS workspace.
Route owner commands explicitly to Quote Builder.
Prepare a dedicated source-control connection before AG OS performs repository automation.
outOfScope: Do not deploy, access credentials, use customer or production data, or run paid AI actions without exact owner approval.
Do not treat the unrelated parent repository as the Quote Builder source repository.
Do not weaken the live application's frame or authentication protections.

risks.risk: The live app is not backed by an isolated Git repository and dedicated remote.
risks.mitigation: Show source control as setup needed and block repository execution until a reviewed repository connection exists.

risks.risk: Quote records can contain sensitive business and customer information.
risks.mitigation: Keep customer and production data outside AG OS evidence unless separately authorized.

qualityGates: Every completed AG OS job records quality and lesson evidence.
Application validation passes before any deployment candidate.
Secret scanning passes before repository publication.
Live changes use an exact, reversible owner-approved deployment.
securityReview: The live application keeps its existing authentication and anti-framing protections. AG OS opens it separately and does not proxy customer data.
costTracking: Record estimated and actual task cost. Paid actions require a matching approval and budget.
deploymentPlan: The current Netlify deployment remains unchanged. Future deployment requires a dedicated source repository, exact candidate verification, and separate owner approval.

ownerWorkspace.summary: Build and run professional contractor quotes, pricing, templates, and PDFs.
ownerWorkspace.previewReason: The live product intentionally blocks iframe embedding. AG OS keeps your workspace open and launches the secure full app in a separate tab.
ownerWorkspace.sourceControlDetail: Structured local application found, but no isolated Git repository or dedicated remote is connected.
operations: Open the full live quote product.
Give AG OS a command targeted to Quote Builder.
Review project jobs, evidence, quality, lessons, and cost.
